hero.headline:
Don't track
your cycle.
Understand it.
hero.subheading: Pepapp doesn't just track your cycle. It gets to know you over time, senses your changes, and gives you what you need exactly when you need it.

features.heading: Look beyond the cycle
features.subheading: Pepapp takes a holistic approach to your health. Not just a calendar — a real companion.

cycle.title: Smart Cycle Tracking
cycle.description: Predicts your cycle, sends reminders, and gets to know you better over time. More accurate, more personal every month.

pepTalk.title: PepTalk AI
pepTalk.description: A companion that truly listens. Answers your questions, understands how you feel, and offers personalized insights.

symptoms.title: Symptoms & Mood
symptoms.description: Track pain, fatigue, mood — all of it. Over time, you'll see clearly how you feel in each phase.

insights.title: Personal Predictions
insights.description: Your data is yours. So are your predictions. Cycle-specific insights that are genuinely personal, not generic.

wellness.title: Energy & Sleep
wellness.description: Holistic health tracking. Discover the connection between your energy, sleep patterns, and cycle.

privacy.title: Privacy First
privacy.description: Data is encrypted, yours alone. Never sold, never shared. Your health data is entirely in your control.

pepTalk.heading:
A companion that
truly listens.
pepTalk.subheading: Not a search engine. Not a symptom checker. PepTalk knows your cycle, understands how you feel, and is there exactly when you need it.

points.personal: Responses that personalize to your cycle

chatExample.userMessage: I'm so tired today and I can't figure out why.
chatExample.aiMessage: You're on day 21 of your cycle and energy dips are very normal at this stage. Your body is adjusting to progesterone shifts. A light walk and magnesium-rich foods may help.

screenshots.heading: Every moment, everywhere
screenshots.subheading: From design to content, every detail was considered to make you feel at ease.

what.question: What is Pepapp?
what.answer: Pepapp is a health companion that goes beyond cycle tracking. It gets to know you over time, understanding your cycle to deliver the insights and support you need exactly when you need them.

ai.question: How does PepTalk AI work?
ai.answer: PepTalk works in tandem with your cycle data. It doesn't just answer questions — it understands how you're feeling and offers personalized suggestions based on where you are in your cycle.

privacy.question: Is my data safe?
privacy.answer: Yes. All your health data is encrypted and fully in your control. We never share your data with third parties. We believe privacy is your most fundamental right.

free.question: Is Pepapp free?
free.answer: Pepapp's core features are completely free. Premium features are available via subscription. You can explore premium features with a free trial before committing.

platforms.question: Which devices can I use it on?
platforms.answer: Pepapp is available on iOS and Android. Your data syncs automatically across all your devices.

irregular.question: Does Pepapp work if I have an irregular cycle?
irregular.answer: Absolutely. Pepapp is designed for irregular cycles too. Over time, it analyzes your data to learn your pattern and personalizes its predictions and recommendations accordingly.

finalCta.heading: Start understanding your cycle.
finalCta.subheading: Join 700,000+ people who trust Pepapp to not just track their cycle — but truly understand it.
finalCta.disclaimer: Free to download. Premium features require subscription.

meta.title: Pepzine | Pepapp
meta.description: Thoughtful writing about your cycle, mind, and body. Science-backed content from Pepapp, written with emotional intelligence.

hero.title: Understand yourself.

empty.title: There are no articles in this category yet.

meta.title: About Pepapp | Pepapp
meta.description: Pepapp is a more personal approach to women’s health — built with emotional intelligence, care, and a deeper understanding of everyday wellbeing.

hero.title: A more personal way to understand women’s health.
hero.description: Pepapp was built to feel less like a tool, and more like something that understands you.

why.line1: Most women’s health apps are built like trackers. Useful, functional, and forgettable.
why.line2: Pepapp was built differently. Not only to help you log what your body does, but to help you understand what it means.
why.line3: We believe understanding your body should feel more human, more thoughtful, and more personal.

beliefs.title: Pepapp is built on a few simple beliefs.

body.title: Your body is not a problem to solve.
body.body: It changes. It adapts. It speaks. We believe your body deserves understanding, not judgment.

cycle.title: Your cycle is more than a calendar.
cycle.body: It shapes your energy, mood, focus, and needs. Understanding it changes how you understand yourself.

understanding.title: Data should become understanding.
understanding.body: Tracking means little unless it becomes insight. Pepapp turns patterns into something you can actually feel and use.

wellbeing.title: Care should feel calm.
wellbeing.body: Health support should not feel clinical, overwhelming, or cold. It should feel gentle, useful, and close to you.

feel.line3: A softer relationship with your body.
feel.line4: A calmer way to understand yourself.

behind.title: Built by a small team that cares deeply.
behind.description: Pepapp is shaped by designers, thinkers, and builders who believe women’s health deserves better products, better language, and better care.

future.title: We’re building something more personal than tracking.
future.description: Pepapp is becoming a more intelligent, more thoughtful companion for women’s everyday wellbeing — one that grows with you, understands your patterns, and feels more personal over time.

finalCta.title: If you’d like to understand Pepapp more closely, the best place to begin is with yourself.

meta.title: Pepapp Premium | Pepapp
meta.description: Pepapp Premium makes Pepapp feel more personal, calmer, and more like yours.

hero.title: Let Pepapp feel a little more like yours.
hero.description: Premium unlocks more personal insights, deeper analysis, and a calmer Pepapp experience. It feels less like more features, and more like Pepapp simply knows you better.

personal.title: More personal guidance
personal.body: Pepapp feels more in tune with you through suggestions that better understand your cycle, mood, and daily needs.

insights.title: Deeper insights
insights.body: See not only what is happening, but better understand why you may be feeling this way.

calm.title: A calmer experience
calm.body: A more focused, softer, ad-free Pepapp experience opens up.

intelligence.title: Pepapp doesn’t just show. It talks with you.
intelligence.description: Premium Intelligence works like a smarter, more conversational layer on top of Pepapp. We can keep understanding your cycle, mood, and daily needs together.
intelligence.pepapp: Your energy may feel a little different today. Want to understand it together?
intelligence.user: Why do I feel like this today?

comparison.title: Start free. Go deeper when you’re ready.

finalCta.title: If you’d like to know Pepapp a little more closely, Premium is the best place to begin.
finalCta.description: Unlock a Pepapp experience that feels more personal, calmer, and more like yours.

articleAppCta.title: I’m here with you there, too.
articleAppCta.description: This article is only the beginning. In Pepapp, we can keep understanding your cycle, mood, and daily needs together.

updates.title: What’s new in Pepapp
updates.description: Follow the latest Pepapp releases, improvements, and meaningful product changes in one simple place.

items: A new conversation experience was prepared for Pepapp Intelligence.
The Premium experience was made more personal and easier to understand.
Pepzine content pages were refreshed for a cleaner reading experience.
General improvements were made across mobile layout, performance, and accessibility.
The homepage narrative was made more emotional and guidance-focused.
The content structure for cycle, mood, and daily suggestions was improved.
Small interface interactions and transitions were refined.
A new page structure was prepared for Pepapp Premium.
The SEO and social sharing preview foundation was strengthened.
